name: @dmc--98/dfe-benchmarks
description: Reproducible performance benchmark harness for Dynamic Form Engine (PRD: Core Excellence). Engine-level today; DOM + competitor lanes (rjsf, Formily, survey-core) plug into the same scenario generator.
//: No install-time deps by design: tests/benches resolve @dmc--98/dfe-core and @dmc--98/dfe-react from source via vitest/esbuild aliases, and vitest runs from the workspace root. Keeps the lockfile importer empty and CI installs untouched.
